channel.title: Discrete Mathematics and Applications
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Discrete Mathematics and Applications

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Vladimir I. Vinokurov DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dma-2024-frontmatter6

item.title: On continuants of continued fractions with rational partial quotients

item.title: On linear equivalence of piecewise-linear permutations of the field 𝔽2n
item.description: Article by Vladimir I. Vinokurov DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dma-2024-0029

item.title: On the prospective minimum of the random walk conditioned to stay nonnegative
item.description: Article by Vladimir I. Vinokurov DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dma-2024-0030

item.title: Limiting behavior of percolation cluster in a multilayered random environment with breakdown
item.description: Article by Vladimir I. Vinokurov DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dma-2024-0031
